competitors.name: Cursor
fetched_urls: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文 — query: Cursor AI editor new features changelog 2026; Cursor AI shared canvas automations agents window May 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Composer 2.5 (May 18, 2026): substantial improvement in intelligence and behavior over Composer 2, with better performance on long-running tasks and more reliable adherence to complex instructions.

Shared Canvases: Teams can now share live snapshots of agent-created reports, dashboards, and interfaces with teammates through browser links with read-only access. Share a link to a live snapshot of a canvas for teammates to open in the browser, and view your team's shared canvases in the Cursor Dashboard.

Cursor Automations in Agents Window: Automations are now available directly in the Agents Window alongside the terminal and browser. Users can configure automations with multiple attached repos so agents reason across all required context and work across repos to deliver, test, and verify tasks.

/loop Skill: With /loop, Cursor can run a prompt repeatedly on a local schedule, until a certain outcome is achieved, or until you stop it. The agent decides when or what event should wake it.

Interactive Canvases (April 15, 2026): Cursor can now create interactive visualizations including dashboards and custom interfaces built with tables, boxes, diagrams, and charts.

Jira Integration: Cursor is now available in Jira, assign work items to Cursor or mention @Cursor in comments to kick off a cloud agent.
competitors.content_hash: Composer 2.5 (May 18, 2026): substantial improvement in intelligence and behavior over Composer 2, with better performance on long-running tasks and more reliable adherence to complex instru

changes.description: Shared Canvases：可分享的 agent 生成可视化内容快照，团队通过浏览器链接访问
changes.evidence: 「share a link to a live snapshot of a canvas for teammates to open in the browser, and view your team's shared canvases in the Cursor Dashboard with read-only access」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：agent 生成 artifact 的跨端共享，但实现为 snapshot 而非真正 live link；与 meee2 live link 核心抽象接近但不同

changes.description: /loop：agent 可在本地按调度循环执行，直到达成目标；Automations 可跨多 repo 协同
changes.evidence: 「With /loop, Cursor can run a prompt repeatedly on a local schedule, until a certain outcome is achieved, or until you stop it」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：持续运行的 agent session 概念；锚点 #4：automations 跨多 repo 拉取 artifact

changes.description: Jira 集成：在 Jira 中直接触发 Cursor cloud agent，从 project tool 中发起 AI session
changes.evidence: 「assign work items to Cursor or mention @Cursor in comments to kick off a cloud agent」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：从 IDE 外部（project tool）触发 AI session，ambient/peripheral 调度概念延伸

changes.description: Interactive Canvases：agent 可生成交互式 dashboard 和自定义界面
changes.evidence: 「Cursor can now create interactive visualizations including dashboards and custom interfaces built with tables, boxes, diagrams, and charts」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：agent 生成 descriptive canvas，但 Cursor 是 code-first，canvas 是输出而非 flow 起点

key_findings: Shared Canvases 上线：agent 生成的可视化内容可通过链接共享给团队，以 snapshot 形式（非 live link）；Cursor 正在建立 agent artifact 的协作层
/loop + 多 repo Automations：Cursor 向持续运行的跨仓库 agent 调度平台演进
Jira 集成：AI agent 可从 project tool 侧触发，ambient 调度概念延伸到 IDE 外

competitors.name: Claude.ai
fetched_urls: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文 — query: Anthropic Claude new features projects artifacts agent 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Live Artifacts (April 2026): Artifacts ships on all paid plans and inside Projects. Live Artifacts are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them. They stay connected to data sources, making them useful for KPI monitoring, pipeline tracking, and content calendars without manual updates.

Projects: Claude.ai Pro and Team users can organize chats into Projects, bringing together knowledge and chat activity. Each project includes a 200K context window.

MCP (March 2026): connects to over 6,000 apps through integrations with Google Drive, Slack, GitHub, Jira, Notion, Stripe, Figma, Zapier, and others.

Claude Managed Agents: Operate in a sandbox with access to private MCP servers, within enterprise boundaries.

Claude Code: Terminal-first agentic coding tool, generally available since 2025-05-22. Runs as autonomous coding agent, searches code, edits files, runs tests, commits to GitHub.
competitors.content_hash: Live Artifacts (April 2026): Artifacts ships on all paid plans and inside Projects. Live Artifacts are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them. They

changes.description: Live Artifacts：artifact 持久连接数据源，每次打开自动刷新，无需手动更新
changes.evidence: 「Live Artifacts are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them. They stay connected to data sources」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：跨工具 artifact live link（非 snapshot），artifact 持久连接外部数据源，与 meee2 live link 核心抽象高度重叠

changes.description: MCP 连接超过 6,000 个应用，成为跨工具 context 的统一接口层
changes.evidence: 「as of March 2026, it connects to over 6,000 apps through integrations with services like Google Drive, Slack, GitHub, Jira, Notion, Stripe, Figma, and Zapier」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具 artifact pull，MCP 成为 Claude 的跨工具 context 协议

key_findings: Live Artifacts 直接实现了「artifact 持久连接数据源」，这是 meee2 live link 概念的 Claude.ai 版本；已在所有付费计划上线
MCP 达到 6,000+ 应用接入，Claude.ai 成为最广泛跨工具 context hub

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
GitHub Copilot: AI that works where you do—in GitHub, your IDE, project tools, chat apps, and custom MCP servers. The platform enables developers to assign autonomous tasks to agents including Copilot itself, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, allowing these systems to plan, explore, and execute work autonomously in the background.

Copilot Spaces allow teams to Turn Copilot into a project expert through integration of documentation and repository context.

Enterprise controls: Manage agent usage with enterprise-grade controls via detailed audit logs and centralized governance. Administrators can implement MCP server access restrictions and maintain allow lists to prevent unauthorized access.

Copilot CLI: Direct Copilot in the terminal using natural language and watch it plan, build, and execute complex workflows powered by existing GitHub context.

Multi-model: Choose from leading LLMs optimized for speed, accuracy, or cost. Combine GitHub Copilot with third-party alternatives through flexible integration.
competitors.content_hash: GitHub Copilot: AI that works where you do—in GitHub, your IDE, project tools, chat apps, and custom MCP servers. The platform enables developers to assign autonomous tasks to agents includi

changes.description: 核心标语从「Your AI accelerator for every workflow」更新为「AI that works where you do—in GitHub, your IDE, project tools, chat apps, and custom MCP servers」，强调无处不在的 MCP 接入层
changes.evidence: 「AI that works where you do—in GitHub, your IDE, project tools, chat apps, and custom MCP servers」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：定位向「任意工具均可作为 AI context 来源」演进，与 meee2 跨工具 artifact pull 方向一致

changes.description: 企业 agent 管控新增 MCP server allow lists，防止未授权访问
changes.evidence: 「Administrators can implement MCP server access restrictions and maintain allow lists to prevent unauthorized access」

changes.description: Copilot Spaces 表述从上次报告的「scale knowledge / team consistency」回退至「Turn Copilot into a project expert」
changes.evidence: 「Turn[ing] Copilot into a project expert through integration of documentation and repository context」

key_findings: 核心标语更新：从「AI accelerator」转向「AI that works where you do」，MCP 接入成为定位核心，暗示 GitHub 将 Copilot 定位为跨工具 AI 层而非单一 IDE 加速器
企业 MCP 管控细化：新增 allow lists 和 server access restrictions，agent 治理层继续加深

competitors.name: Linear
fetched_urls: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文 — query: Linear app changelog AI automation agent new features 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Linear Agent (March 2026, public beta, all plans): Skills save recurring workflows (catching up on projects, drafting issues from meeting notes). Agent workflows auto-trigger when issues enter triage.

Code Intelligence (May 2026, Business/Enterprise): gives Linear Agent controlled access to your codebase, turning repositories into shared product context your whole team can use. Linear Agent can reason about how your product actually works, not just what's captured in issues, projects, and docs.

Linear Agent MCP support (April 2026): Linear Agent can connect to your tools via MCP, giving it access to data and actions beyond your Linear workspace. Bring external context into workflows to investigate issues, plan projects, write specs.

Linear Diffs (May 2026): Review diffs from any issue with a PR, iterate on further changes with agents, and ship code from Linear.

Deeplink to AI coding tools (February 2026): Launch preferred coding tool directly from a Linear issue with prefilled prompt including issue ID and all relevant context.
competitors.content_hash: Linear Agent (March 2026, public beta, all plans): Skills save recurring workflows (catching up on projects, drafting issues from meeting notes). Agent workflows auto-trigger when issues en

changes.description: Code Intelligence：Linear Agent 获得代码库完整访问权限，将 repo 转化为全团队共享的产品 context
changes.evidence: 「gives Linear Agent controlled access to your codebase, turning repositories into shared product context your whole team can use. With Code Intelligence, Linear Agent can reason about how your product actually works」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具 artifact pull（代码库作为 artifact 被 agent 跨层引用）；锚点 #1：agent 在 project management 层获得真实 context 而非仅从 issue 推断

changes.description: Linear Agent 正式上线：skills、自动触发 workflow、MCP 接入，成为 project management 层的 AI agent 中枢
changes.evidence: 「Linear Agent is now available in public beta for all teams. Agent and Skills are included on all Linear plans」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：project management 中 agent 与人类并行工作，但协议不同于 meee2（Linear 中 agent 是工具，不是 session 对等体）

changes.description: Linear Diffs：在 Linear issue 内直接 review 代码 diff，并与 agent 迭代修改
changes.evidence: 「Review diffs from any issue with a PR, iterate on further changes with agents, and ship code from Linear」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：Linear 正在成为横跨 project management + code 的统一 artifact 层

key_findings: Linear Agent + Code Intelligence：Linear 正在演变为「project management + code + AI 推理」的统一平台，agent 可访问代码库全量 context
MCP 接入让 Linear Agent 可拉取外部工具数据，Linear 成为跨工具 context 汇聚点
Linear Diffs 打通 issue → PR → code review → agent 迭代的完整 loop，project tool 边界持续扩展

competitors.name: Notion AI
fetched_urls: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文 — query: Notion AI new features agent automation connector 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Notion Developer Platform (May 2026, 3.5): External Agents API allows users to bring favorite agents into Notion, with partnerships including Claude, Codex, Decagon working out of the box. Notion Workers: hosted runtime for custom code deployed through CLI in a secure sandbox. Database Sync: sync any data source with an API into Notion databases with no servers to manage, powered by Workers. Notion MCP connects to 11+ partner apps including Linear, Figma, HubSpot, Ramp, Wiz, Stripe, GitHub.

Custom Agents (February 2026, 3.3): handle repetitive tasks, answer FAQs, compile status updates, automate workflows. Over 1 million agents built. AI Autofill brings agents into databases for automatic enrichment.

April 2026 (3.4 part 2): Custom Agents easier to fine-tune.
competitors.content_hash: Notion Developer Platform (May 2026, 3.5): External Agents API allows users to bring favorite agents into Notion, with partnerships including Claude, Codex, Decagon working out of the box.

changes.description: Developer Platform：External Agents API 开放，Notion 成为第三方 AI agent 的执行环境（Claude、Codex 等）
changes.evidence: 「External Agents API allows users to bring favorite agents into Notion, with partnerships including Claude, Codex, Decagon, and others working out of the box」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：Notion 成为跨 agent 的 artifact 汇聚点，但定位是 document workspace hub 而非 session protocol

changes.description: Database Sync：任意外部数据源可实时同步进 Notion 数据库，无需服务器
changes.evidence: 「sync any data source with an API into Notion databases with no servers to manage, powered by Workers that run on Notion's infrastructure」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：live link 概念在 document 层的实现，属于 database 同步而非 artifact live link

key_findings: Notion 成为 AI agent hub：External Agents API 让 Claude、Codex 等在 Notion 内执行，Notion 定位从 workspace 转向 agent orchestration platform
Custom Agents 已有 100 万个，AI Autofill 将 agent 嵌入 database enrichment，自动化粒度持续下探

competitors.name: Slack
fetched_urls: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文 — query: Slack new AI features agent canvas automation 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Rebuilt Slackbot as full AI agent (2026, Business+/Enterprise+): transformed from notification tool into fully powered AI agent capable of searching enterprise data, drafting documents, taking action on behalf of employees. Built on LLM architecture with sophisticated search (Salesforce records, Google Drive, calendar data, years of Slack conversations).

AI-Skills: teams define specific jobs (e.g., 'summarize this campaign brief'), Slackbot recognizes and offers to run them automatically.

AI in Canvas: summarize key points, extract action items, generate first draft from any Slack conversation.

Generate AI Response step in Workflow Automation: write a prompt, point at knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), let LLM summarize threads, translate messages, draft replies.
competitors.content_hash: Rebuilt Slackbot as full AI agent (2026, Business+/Enterprise+): transformed from notification tool into fully powered AI agent capable of searching enterprise data, drafting documents, takin

changes.description: Slackbot 重构为全功能 AI agent：LLM 架构，可访问企业数据，代表用户执行操作
changes.evidence: 「Slackbot, transforming it from a simple notification tool into a fully powered AI agent capable of searching enterprise data, drafting documents, and taking action on behalf of employees」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：comms 层出现持续 ambient agent（Slackbot），但属于 comms-first 范式，不是 session protocol

changes.description: AI-Skills：可定义 Slackbot 自定义技能，自动识别并执行特定任务
changes.evidence: 「AI-Skills allow teams to define specific jobs once (like 'summarize this campaign brief'), and Slackbot will recognize when you're trying to do that specific task and offer to run the skill automatically」

key_findings: Slackbot 从通知工具升级为 LLM-based 全功能 agent，能访问 Salesforce、Google Drive、日历等企业数据，代表用户执行操作
AI-Skills + Workflow AI 步骤：Slack 内部自动化层加速 AI 化，但核心仍是 comms-first 而非 session protocol

competitors.name: Reflect
fetched_urls: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文 — query: Reflect notes app new features AI sync 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: Reflect AI supports GPT-4o (latest OpenAI) and Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Anthropic). AI voice transcriber, AI assistant, and chat with notes. Auto-generates AI summary of saved links via semantic search. Real-time sync across devices including iOS with offline support. iCal events integration (connect iCloud account). Auto-backlink suggestion: select paragraph, AI suggests backlinks.
competitors.content_hash: Reflect AI supports GPT-4o (latest OpenAI) and Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Anthropic). AI voice transcriber, AI assistant, and chat with notes. Auto-generates AI summary of saved links via semanti

changes.description: 新增 GPT-4o 支持，提升 AI 语音转录、助手和笔记对话速度
changes.evidence: 「Reflect has added the new GPT-4o, which makes Reflect's AI voice transcriber, AI assistant and the chat with your notes much faster」

key_findings: 本次抓取未发现与 meee2 锚点高度相关的变化，Reflect 主要更新为模型升级（GPT-4o）和 iCal 集成，无新 agent/session 功能

competitors.name: Raycast
fetched_urls: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文 — query: Raycast new features AI agent changelog 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Raycast 2.0 (public beta, May 14, 2026): Windows support for first time, macOS and Windows both in public beta. New UI redesign, files and folders in root search, AI dictation system-wide.

Agents (renamed from Presets): reused across chats, update once and change applies to every chat.

Memory: automatic summary Raycast AI builds from your conversations over time.

Profile: jot down context about yourself that Raycast AI uses across conversations.

Skills: give Raycast AI custom instructions and knowledge for tasks you do often.

AI dictation: dictate text directly through Raycast across any app system-wide, not just inside Raycast window.

Experimental: MCP HTTP Servers support (SSE and Streamable protocols), AI Extensions for Ollama (tool calling with local models), OpenRouter support.
competitors.content_hash: Raycast 2.0 (public beta, May 14, 2026): Windows support for first time, macOS and Windows both in public beta. New UI redesign, files and folders in root search, AI dictation system-wide.

changes.description: Raycast 2.0 进入 Windows 公测，peripheral AI layer 从 macOS 专属扩展至跨平台
changes.evidence: 「Raycast 2.0 launched in public beta on May 14 with Windows support for the first time, and is now in public beta on both macOS and Windows」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：meee2 的 peripheral 差异化基于 macOS 菜单栏；Raycast 扩展至 Windows 表明 peripheral AI layer 将成为各平台标配

changes.description: Memory + Profile：Raycast 构建跨 session 用户 context 层，Agents 跨对话复用配置
changes.evidence: 「Memory is an automatic summary Raycast AI builds from your conversations over time」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：跨 session 持久化用户 context，接近 meee2 的 session 连续性概念，但在 launcher 范式内实现

changes.description: 系统级 AI 语音输入：跨任意 App 的 AI dictation，不限于 Raycast 窗口内
changes.evidence: 「Built-in AI dictation allows you to dictate text directly through Raycast across any app in a system-wide manner, not just inside the Raycast window」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：peripheral layer 向全系统输入接管扩展，ambient AI input 概念

key_findings: Raycast 2.0 进入 Windows 公测，peripheral AI layer 跨平台化，meee2 macOS 专属优势面临压力
Memory + Agents + Skills 构成跨 session 的用户 context 层，Raycast 正在向持久化 AI 助手演进

competitors.name: Replit
fetched_urls: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文 — query: Replit AI agent multi-agent workspace new features 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
Replit Agent 4 (March 2026): multi-agent parallel execution, ships production-ready software up to 10x faster.

Parallel Agents: multiple agents tackle different parts of project at once (auth, database, backend, frontend). Agent 4 automatically breaks large tasks into smaller forks, runs concurrently using sub-agents, merges results.

Collaborative workspace: multiple team members submit requests simultaneously while agent intelligently sequences and executes them. Teammates can work in own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent. Every request broken into discrete tasks running in background; team members track status, review results, approve changes before merging.

Additional: Claude Opus 4.7 in Power mode, simpler Agent mode selector, per-user spend limits, 9 ready-to-use connectors, 4 new MCP servers, follow-up task suggestions.
competitors.content_hash:
Replit Agent 4 (March 2026): multi-agent parallel execution, ships production-ready software up to 10x faster.

Parallel Agents: multiple agents tackle different parts of project at once (

changes.description: 共享 session：团队成员可与 agent 共同在同一 session 中协作，各自提交请求，agent 协调执行
changes.evidence: 「Teammates can work in their own chat threads or collaborate in a shared session alongside the agent」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：人 + AI 在同一 session 协作的明确表述，但 Replit 实现为 code-first，协议不同（人是请求方，agent 是执行方，非对等 session）

changes.description: Parallel sub-agents：Agent 4 自动分解大任务为并发 sub-agents，结果合并后统一交付
changes.evidence: 「Agent 4 automatically breaks them into smaller forks, runs them concurrently using sub-agents, and merges the results, resolving any conflicts with dedicated sub-agents」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：multi-agent 并发执行框架，但在 code-first context 中，非通用 session protocol

key_findings: Replit Agent 4 引入「shared session with agent」：团队成员可与 AI agent 在同一 session 内协作，是 meee2 锚点 #1 在 code-first 领域的具体实现
并发 sub-agents + 后台任务追踪：Replit 的多 agent 执行框架趋于成熟，但协议是 code-first 而非通用 workspace

competitors.name: Superwhisper
fetched_urls: 来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文 — query: Superwhisper app new features AI integration 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: Superwhisper v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS): Claude Code and Open Code agent integration. Pipes transcripts into the terminal agent, allowing Superwhisper with Cursor, Claude Code, Open Code, Amp, Codex, or any agentic coding app without keyboard input. Per-mode keyboard shortcuts (v2.12.0, April 2026). Redesigned UI with new history, full text search, segmented playback, fast load, multi-select delete, upgraded model library. Remote cloud AI models: Gemini and Grok support with enhanced multilingual transcription. Recording retention setting for automatic cleanup.
competitors.content_hash: Superwhisper v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS): Claude Code and Open Code agent integration. Pipes transcripts into the terminal agent, allowing Superwhisper with Cursor, Claude Code, Open Code,

changes.description: Claude Code / Cursor 等 coding agent 集成：语音输入直接 pipe 到 terminal agent，无需键盘
changes.evidence: 「The integration pipes transcripts into the terminal agent, allowing you to use Superwhisper with Cursor, Claude Code, Open Code, Amp, Codex, or any other agentic coding app, without touching your keyboard」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：voice 作为 peripheral input layer，直接接入 AI coding session；与 meee2 peripheral 概念互补而非竞争

key_findings: Superwhisper 成为 AI coding session 的语音输入 peripheral：voice → terminal agent pipe，覆盖 Cursor、Claude Code 等主流工具

alerts.headline: Live Artifacts 上线：artifact 持久连接数据源，每次打开自动刷新，直接实现 meee2 live link 抽象
alerts.evidence: 「Live Artifacts are dashboards and trackers that refresh with current data every time you reopen them. They stay connected to data sources」
alerts.action_suggestion: 核查 meee2 live link 的核心差异化点：Claude.ai Live Artifacts 是数据源驱动的刷新（open-time pull），meee2 的 live link 若实现了双向 live sync 或更细粒度的 artifact-level link，需在 positioning 中明确区分「open-time refresh」与「always-live bidirectional link」

alerts.headline: Shared Canvases + /loop：agent artifact 共享层上线，持续运行 agent session 能力落地
alerts.evidence: 「share a link to a live snapshot of a canvas for teammates to open in the browser」；「With /loop, Cursor can run a prompt repeatedly on a local schedule, until a certain outcome is achieved」
alerts.action_suggestion: Cursor Shared Canvas 是 snapshot 而非 live link，meee2 需在 positioning 中强调「真正 live link vs snapshot sharing」的本质差距。/loop 与 meee2 持续 agent session 概念重叠，需持续关注是否演化为跨工具 session 调度协议

alerts.headline: Code Intelligence：Linear Agent 获得代码库完整访问权，project management 工具向 AI-native 统一平台演进
alerts.evidence: 「gives Linear Agent controlled access to your codebase, turning repositories into shared product context your whole team can use. With Code Intelligence, Linear Agent can reason about how your product actually works」
alerts.action_suggestion: 持续监控 Linear Agent 是否演化为跨 session 的项目状态 source of truth。当前路径：issue + code + agent + MCP 外部数据 = 全公司共享 context 层。若 Linear 加入 session 记录或 workspace timeline，将直接触碰 meee2 锚点 #1
